name: Ronnie Spradlin
bio: Ronnie Spradlin serves as the Mayor of Kilgore, a historic oil boom city in Gregg County. Kilgore is home to the world-famous Kilgore College Rangerettes and the East Texas Oil Museum. The mayor works with the city council to promote economic development and community vitality.
campaignPromises: Revitalize downtown Kilgore and attract new businesses
Support Kilgore College and local education
Promote Kilgore's historical heritage and tourism
